creator: kensmith@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched


There are now patches in -current to cut down on disc swapping (r183921) 
and to build DVDs as part of building a release.  I'll be trying to get 
the DVDs part into both 7.1 and 6.4.  I think its too late to get the 
disc swapping patch into 6.4 but there should be enough time to get it 
into 7.1.
